title: T-021 — QA-020 specs_list page (prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-021 — QA-020 specs_list page

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-020, §8.5 prototype specs_list
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `/quality/specs` Server Component listing specs with filters (product, status, applies_to, version), columns SpecCode | Product | Version | Status badge | AppliesTo | EffectiveFrom | ApprovedBy | Actions; New Spec button.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/app/quality/specs/page.tsx` Server Component reads listSpecs(filters).
2. shadcn Table + Filter bar (Select for product, status, applies_to).
3. Status Badge mapping: draft=secondary, under_review=warning, active=success, expired=destructive, superseded=outline.
4. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:3-79`.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/specs/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/listSpecs.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/SpecsListTable.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/__tests__/specsList.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:3-79, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (filter bar with product/status/applies_to Selects + New Spec button, 8-column Table in declared order), visuals (shadcn Table/Select/Badge/Button only, status Badge variant maps per checklist), and interaction parity (row click → /quality/specs/:id, New Spec → /quality/specs/new) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given listSpecs returns 0 rows, when the page renders, then the empty-state copy 'No specifications yet — click New Spec to define one.' is shown
3. Given filter status=active applied via search params, when the page renders, then only active specs are listed and the URL params persist

pipeline_inputs.description: Specs list page with filter bar + 8-column Table + New Spec button, parity with prototype specs_list.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component reads listSpecs(filters) helper. shadcn Table 8 columns matching prototype specs-screens.jsx:3-79. Status Badge variants via parity checklist. URL search params persist filters. Honor translation notes: shadcn Select only.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:3-79, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (filter bar with product/status/applies_to Selects + New Spec button, 8-column Table in declared order), visuals (shadcn primitives only, status Badge variant per checklist), and interaction (row click → /quality/specs/:id, New Spec → /quality/specs/new) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given listSpecs returns 0 rows, when the page renders, then the empty-state copy 'No specifications yet — click New Spec to define one.' is shown
Given filter status=active in search params, when the page renders, then only active specs are listed and params persist on reload
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/__tests__/specsList.test.tsx asserting column order, empty state, URL filter persistence
risk_red_lines: Do not use native HTML <select> per translation notes
Do not show New Spec button for non-quality_lead callers
Do not lose filter state on navigation
